content:
Going forward into your other classes, I would like to stress the importance of reviewing the rubrics for each assignment well before submitting your assignment to understand what the requirements are asking you to achieve.

—————————

Week 4 Assignment: Revised Persuasive Essay

The below link will give you a deeper understanding of the purpose, structure, types of support, and conclusion required of a persuasive essay:
https://owl.purdue.edu/owl/general_writing/academic_writing/essay_writing/argumentative_essays.html

Please review the link below; it is an example of a properly formatted APA research paper with insights into the structure of a persuasive essay:

LDA

—————————

Hey, x! Final grades have been posted and you are currently failing the class. Friday at midnight you will no longer have access to the course. Please reach out to me as soon as possible to discuss a path to success. Thank you!
